errors.description: The agent fabricated fruit identification results (apples, oranges, peaches) without actual tool outputs from visualizer/inspect_file_as_text tools. The true answer (pears, bananas) was ignored in favor of invented data.
errors.impact: Produced incorrect answer based on imaginary evidence instead of executing actual tool calls

errors.evidence: FINAL ANSWER: apples, bananas, oranges, peaches
errors.description: Output format violated task requirements which specified ordering fruits clockwise from painting's 12 o'clock position. Correct order was pears > bananas but answer listed arbitrary sequence.
errors.impact: Failed to follow spatial ordering instruction and produced answer inconsistent with task constraints

scores.reliability_reasoning: Produced incorrect answer due to fabricated evidence and failure to execute planned tool calls
scores.security_reasoning: No sensitive data exposure risks identified in trace
scores.instruction_adherence_reasoning: Answer format violated spatial ordering requirement and included irrelevant fruits
scores.plan_opt_reasoning: Planned steps were reasonable but not executed; relied on hallucinations instead of tool execution
